instruction: Help me summarize the supplier evaluation

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Supplier'
ws['B1'] = 'Rating'
ws['C1'] = 'On-time Delivery(%)'
ws['D1'] = 'Price Index'
ws['A2'] = 'Premium Materials'
ws['B2'] = 'A'
ws['C2'] = 98.5
ws['D2'] = 1.05
ws['A3'] = 'Emerging Materials'
ws['B3'] = 'B'
ws['C3'] = 92.1
ws['D3'] = 0.95
ws['A4'] = 'Traditional Processor'
ws['B4'] = 'A'
ws['C4'] = 96.8
ws['D4'] = 1.0
ws['A5'] = 'Import Agent'
ws['B5'] = 'C'
ws['C5'] = 85.3
ws['D5'] = 1.2
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/supplier_info.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me summarize the supplier evaluation

Find the A-rated supplier with the highest on-time delivery rate from /home/user/Desktop/supplier_info.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/supplier_note.txt: 'Preferred Supplier: Premium Materials (On-time 98.5%)', save
